flashcards.meaningEn: a loyal animal commonly kept as a pet
flashcards.exampleEn: Our dog waits at the door every evening.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con chó của chúng tôi đợi ở cửa mỗi buổi tối.

flashcards.meaningEn: a small furry animal often kept as a pet
flashcards.exampleEn: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con mèo đang ngủ trên ghế sofa.

flashcards.meaningEn: a large wild cat known as the king of the jungle
flashcards.exampleEn: The lion rested under the tree.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con sư tử nghỉ ngơi dưới gốc cây.

flashcards.meaningEn: a very large gray animal with a long trunk
flashcards.exampleEn: The elephant used its trunk to pick up water.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con voi dùng vòi để hút nước.

flashcards.meaningEn: a large wild cat with orange fur and black stripes
flashcards.exampleEn: The tiger moved quietly through the forest.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con hổ di chuyển lặng lẽ qua khu rừng.

flashcards.meaningEn: a small animal with long ears and soft fur
flashcards.exampleEn: The rabbit jumped across the grass.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con thỏ nhảy qua bãi cỏ.

flashcards.meaningEn: an intelligent animal that can climb trees easily
flashcards.exampleEn: The monkey grabbed a banana from the tree.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con khỉ lấy một quả chuối từ trên cây.

flashcards.meaningEn: an animal with feathers and wings that usually can fly
flashcards.exampleEn: A small bird was singing outside the window.
flashcards.exampleVi: Một con chim nhỏ đang hót ngoài cửa sổ.

flashcards.meaningEn: a long animal with no legs that moves along the ground
flashcards.exampleEn: The snake disappeared into the bushes.
flashcards.exampleVi: Con rắn biến mất vào bụi cây.

flashcards.meaningEn: a large animal used for riding or farm work
flashcards.exampleEn: She learned how to ride a horse last summer.
flashcards.exampleVi: Cô ấy học cưỡi ngựa vào mùa hè năm ngoái.
